name:
I'M outside an open window
on the ledge of a very tall building
description:
I'M outside an open window
on the ledge of a very tall building
hints: You are on a high ledge. There must be a magic word to get off safely. Do NOT jump!
The HELP says you need a magic word. Think about pirate sayings. You need a specific item too.
SAY YOHO while holding the blood-soaked book to teleport to the pirate island.
SAY YOHO with the book in your inventory to teleport to the beach. GO WINDOW to go back inside. Do NOT JUMP - you die!

effects: Message: I may need to say a MAGIC word here!
Message: Everything spins around and suddenly I'm elsewhere...

notes: The magic teleport point. SAY YOHO with the book teleports to the pirate island beach (room 6). JUMPing is fatal. GO WINDOW returns to the alcove (room 2). The book is found in the alcove bookcase.
